mapper.sql: id, supplier_no, supplier_name, contact_mobile, contact_name, status, token, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO suppliers (supplier_no, supplier_name, contact_mobile, contact_name, status, token, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{supplierNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contactMobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contactName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{token, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO suppliers (supplier_no, supplier_name, contact_mobile, contact_name, status, token, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.supplierNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.supplierName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.contactMobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.contactName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.token, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM suppliers WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
SELECT FROM suppliers WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
mapper.update: UPDATE suppliers SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE suppliers SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
